name: @emoya-cmyk/compaction
description: Lossless token-compaction for the dashboard family: array-of-objects -> schema header + delimited rows (every value survives; decode(encode(x)) === x), plus a prompt-prefix cache-alignment discipline. Zero dependencies. Lossless-only by design (no row-drop, no truncation, no reversible-offload) so it stays compatible with the grounded-AI invariant.
